## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you want -->

## Current Phase & Scope Check

<!-- Is this feature in scope for the current phase? Check TODO.md before filing. -->
- Current phase:
- Does this feature appear in TODO.md for the current phase? Yes / No / Future phase (specify):

## Problem This Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about behavior, not implementation. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What alternatives did you consider? Why is this the preferred approach? -->

## Impact Assessment

| Area | Impact |
|------|--------|
| API contract changes? | Yes / No |
| Database schema changes? | Yes / No |
| Breaking change? | Yes / No |
| Security implications? | Yes / No |
| Phase scope (current or future)? | |

## Documentation Required

<!-- What documentation will need to be updated if this is implemented? -->
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/ (specify file):
- [ ] DECISIONS.md (if architectural decision)
- [ ] API strategy doc
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, mockups, references, or examples -->
